qa_pair.question: Using the RetailExpress API, find the total number of product types defined in the system. Respond with just the number.
qa_pair.answer: This requires live API access to determine - placeholder for post-deployment verification

qa_pair.question: List all retail outlets in RetailExpress. Which outlet has the alphabetically first name? Respond with just the outlet name.
qa_pair.answer: This requires live API access to determine - placeholder for post-deployment verification

qa_pair.question: Find the product with SKU "SERGIO-MIKE" in RetailExpress. What is the product type name associated with this product? Respond with just the product type name.
qa_pair.answer: This requires live API access to determine - placeholder for post-deployment verification

qa_pair.question: How many distinct suppliers are registered in RetailExpress? First list all suppliers using pagination (page_size 250), then count the total. Respond with just the number from total_records.
qa_pair.answer: This requires live API access to determine - placeholder for post-deployment verification

qa_pair.question: Find the purchase order with the most recent created_since date in 2026. What is the supplier name associated with that PO? First list recent POs, then look up the supplier. Respond with just the supplier name.
qa_pair.answer: This requires live API access to determine - placeholder for post-deployment verification

qa_pair.question: How many freight types are configured in RetailExpress? List them all and count. Respond with just the number.
qa_pair.answer: This requires live API access to determine - placeholder for post-deployment verification

qa_pair.question: Find all inventory movement logs for the Claremont outlet (you will need to first find the outlet ID for Claremont, then query movement logs filtered by that outlet_id). How many movement log entries exist for this outlet? Respond with the total_records count.
qa_pair.answer: This requires live API access to determine - placeholder for post-deployment verification

qa_pair.question: What currencies are supported in RetailExpress? List all currencies and identify which one has the code "AUD". What is the full currency name? Respond with just the currency name.

Find the customer type that is used for online/ecommerce customers. First list all customer types, then identify the one most likely for online shoppers. What is its name? Respond with just the customer type name.
qa_pair.answer: This requires live API access to determine - placeholder for post-deployment verification

qa_pair.question: How many voucher types are defined in RetailExpress? List all voucher types and respond with just the count as a number.
qa_pair.answer: This requires live API access to determine - placeholder for post-deployment verification
